calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-10-2025 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-07-2025 Continued To Aug-06-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Third-Party Witness Milanendra Vikramsingh Piterman And For Sanctions; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of David S. Killoran
Off Calendar May-12-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WAYMO LLC's Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Third-Party Witness Milanendra Vikramsingh Piterman And For Sanctions;

Plaintiff Waymo LLC's Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Third-Party Witness Milanendra Vikramsingh Piterman And For Sanctions is OFF CALENDAR in light of the Dismissal of Entire Action with Prejudice, entered on May 7, 2025.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Third-Party Witness Milanendra Vikramsingh Piterman And For Sanctions; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of David S. Killoran
Off Calendar Apr-09-2025 Continued To May-12-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-09-2025 Continued To Jun-04-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Third-Party Witness Milanendra Vikramsingh Piterman And For Sanctions; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of David S. Killoran
Off Calendar Jan-13-2025 Continued To Apr-11-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. DAVID KILLORAN, Esq. of Dykema Gossset LLP (tel: 213-457-1800) for Plaintiff.
Atty. AUSTIN HOUVENER, Esq. of Toschi, Collins, Doyle & Houvener, APC (tel: 510-835-3400) for Third-party witness Milanendra Vikramsingh Piterman and specially appearing for the Defendants.

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF WAYMO LLC's Motion To Compel The Deposition Of Third-Party Witness Milanendra Vikramsingh Piterman And For Sanctions.

Counsel David Killoran states the parties have an agreement to continue the matter for 90 days. Upon conclusion, the Court grants the parties' request for continuance and continues the matter to April 11, 2025. The moving party must submit for filing any further pleadings by March 19, 2025. Third-party witness and the defendants are to submit any further pleadings by March 26, 2025.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/HEK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-21-2024 Continued To Feb-05-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
